reviews.review_description: Gorilla Parkour is a game that uses the Gorilla Tag Mechanics that is a Parkour Game, there is currently two levels, Cloudy Trail and Tricky Taiga, they are working on a third map that is a Mountain Map. The Shop involves cosmetics, such as, Banana Hat, Golden Mask, etc. Then the Main Lobby, there is a computer, speakers to mute and unmute music, and the two parkours outside. The computer has 6 or 7 tabs, the tabs are, ROOM, COLOR, DEV, CREDITS, etc. I recommend you download this game, it is fire, you might even meet some Moderators or Owners! (I'm a Moderator/Ripe Banana Stick)
